additional_metadata.note: First planned Brisbane dbt event; canceled last-minute when the presenter had to return home.

events.agenda: A hands-on session for setting up dbt Cloud from scratch, led by dbt Labs; event was canceled before it took place.
events.event_description: A walk-through of an end-to-end simple project setting up dbt Cloud, aimed at people new to dbt.
events.event_name: dbt Hands On - Getting Started in Brisbane
events.raw_text:
Canceled

Thu, May 18, 2023 · 2:30 PM to 4:30 PM AEST

KeyData, Brisbane City

dbt Hands On - Getting Started in Brisbane

Join us to walk through an end to end simple project setting up dbt Cloud. The session will be led by Rabi Abbasi from dbt setting up a dbt environment from scratch to a working functional stage.

Comment from host: unfortunately our presenter has needed to return home quickly and we will need to cancel today's events.

events.agenda: First non-canceled Brisbane dbt Meetup, covering the latest dbt announcements and customer knowledge sharing.
